# Axuvo

> Axuvo is a design studio based in Kerala, India that builds AI-powered Google review funnels and custom websites for local businesses. The goal: turn happy customers into genuine 5-star Google reviews, automatically, while catching unhappy feedback privately before it goes public.

## What Axuvo does

- **AI Google Review Funnels** — A system where customers scan a branded QR code, happy customers (4–5 stars) are routed straight to Google to leave a public review, and unhappy customers (1–3 stars) are sent to a private feedback form instead of Google. Growth and Pro plans also send automated WhatsApp review requests a few hours after each visit, with a smart follow-up if there's no reply.
- **Custom Websites** — Bespoke, animation-rich websites built for local businesses.

## Pricing

Review funnel (monthly, plus a one-time ₹9,999 setup):
- Starter — ₹5,000/month — 1 location — funnel setup, branded QR cards, review dashboard
- Growth — ₹12,000/month — 1 location (+₹9,000 per extra) — adds AI-written replies, automated WhatsApp requests, smart follow-ups, monthly reporting
- Pro — ₹21,999/month — up to 3 locations — adds priority support and competitor review tracking

Custom websites: from ₹40,000 as a one-time build. Flexible payment available on request.

## Important

- Axuvo does NOT create fake reviews. It only helps businesses collect genuine reviews from real customers.
- Axuvo is a new studio welcoming its founding clients.
